reasoning: The control 3.1.14 requires routing remote access via managed access control points, which in Kubernetes can be achieved by implementing NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic by default, ensuring that only explicitly allowed traffic is permitted. Additionally, using TLS for Ingress resources and restricting the use of LoadBalancer service types to prevent unrestricted external access aligns with the control's intent to manage access points.
title: 3_1_14: 3.1.14 Route remote access via managed access control points
